title: HIV.E-F PMTCT
description: This tab describes the data that are collected relevant to HIV care and treatment of pregnant and postpartum women and their newborns during the delivery and postpartum care and the infant diagnosis and final HIV status workflows (HIV.E and HIV.F)

resourceType.description: Resource type identifier for HIVEPMTCT logical model

@context.description: JSON-LD context for this logical model with ValueSet vocabularies

anyOf.description: URI reference to external JSON-LD context

@type.description: JSON-LD type identifier for HIVEPMTCT logical model

pregnantWomanFirstName.description: Pregnant woman's first or given name

pregnantWomanSurname.description: Pregnant woman's family name or last name

pregnantWomanUniqueId.description: Unique identifier generated for new clients or a universal ID, if used in the country

antenatalCareNumber.description: Identification number assigned to woman at first visit to the ANC based on national system

gestationalAge.description: Gestational age in weeks and/or days depending on the source of gestational age

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE6

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.E.DE6

sourceOfGestationalAge.description: Gestational age can be calculated multiple ways. This data element describes where the gestational age above has been calculated from.

expectedDateOfDeliveryEdd.description: Expected date of delivery based on gestational age

numberOfPregnanciesGravida.description: Total number of times the woman has been pregnant (including this pregnancy). Also referred to as gravida.

numberOfPreviousPregnancies.description: This calculates the total number of all previous pregnancies (i.e. not including this current pregnancy). This is done for easier obstetric history calculations.

numberOfMiscarriagesAndOrAbortions.description: Total number of pregnancies lost or ended due to miscarriages and/or abortions before 22 weeks / 5 months

numberOfLiveBirths.description: Total number of live births after 22 weeks

numberOfStillbirths.description: Total number of stillbirths after 22 weeks

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE17

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.E.DE17

items.description: Coding from ValueSet HIV.E.DE17. Supports both FHIR Coding structure and JSON-LD structure.

pastPregnancyComplications.description: Whether the woman has had any complications or problems in any previous pregnancy

otherPastPregnancyProblemsSpecify.description: Woman experienced other past pregnancy problems not described above (specify)

parity.description: Total number of live and stillbirths (calculated)

pregnancyInHivInfectedWoman.description: Any HIV diagnosis in a pregnant woman as determined by the national HIV testing algorithm, or a pregnancy in a woman previously diagnosed with HIV

dateNewPregnancyOfHivPositiveWomanIdenti.description: Earliest date when a new pregnancy of an HIV-positive woman is recorded

ancContactDuringPregnancy.description: Whether the mother had at least one ANC contact (visit)

dateOfFirstAncVisit.description: Date of the pregnant woman's first ANC visit

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE41

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.E.DE41

timingOfArtInitiation.description: When the pregnant woman or mother initiated ART, for women living with HIV.

maternalUseOfRecommendedArtRegimen.description: Whether the mother is taking a recommended ART regimen

deliveryDate.description: Date on which the woman delivered

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE47

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.E.DE47

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE52

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.E.DE52

deliveryMode.description: Mode of delivery for current pregnancy

obstetricComplications.description: Serious or life-threatening obstetric complications during pregnancy, delivery or postpartum experienced by mother or her newborn

liveBirth.description: The woman had a live birth

liveBirthToAnHivPositiveWoman.description: A woman living with HIV had a live birth

gestationalAgeAtBirth.description: Best estimate of gestational age in completed weeks when infant was born (an indication of prematurity, preterm and extreme preterm)

smallForGestationalAgeSga.description: Whether the infant was small for gestational age (SGA) at birth (less than 10th percentile)

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE62

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.E.DE62

pretermBirthStatus.description: The woman gave birth when the gestational age is less than 37 weeks

maternalArtStartDate.description: The date on which the infant was started or restarted on ART

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE67

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.E.DE67

placeOfDelivery.description: The type of place where the woman delivered

otherPlaceOfDelivery.description: The woman delivered at another location that is not at home or at a health facility (specify)

deliveryFacility.description: Facility where the infant or child was born

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE75

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.E.DE75

infantSurname.description: Infant's family name or last name

infantUniqueId.description: Unique identifier generated for new clients or a universal ID, if used in the country

motherFirstName.description: Biological mother's first or given name

motherSurname.description: Biological mother's family name or last name

motherUniqueId.description: Unique identifier generated for new clients or a universal ID, if used in the country

caregiverSurname.description: Caregiver's family name or last name

caregiverUniqueIdentifier.description: Unique identifier generated for new clients or a universal ID, if used in the country

ancContactDate.description: The date and time of the client's ANC contact (in the ANC DAK this is called 'Contact date')

referral.description: If infant was referred for care

infantDateOfBirth.description: The infant's date of birth (DOB) if known

estimatedAgeOfInfant.description: If DOB is unknown, enter the client's estimated age. Display client's age in number of years

ageOfInfant.description: Infant age calculated using date of birth

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE91

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.E.DE91

infantWeight.description: The infant's current weight in kilograms

birthWeight.description: Birth weight in kg of the baby

lowBirthWeight.description: Note if infant </¬¨‚â•2500 g at birth

lengthOfInfant.description: Length of infant at birth in cm

headCircumference.description: Head circumference of infant at birth in cm

motherHivTestConducted.description: Whether an HIV test of the mother was conducted

motherHivTestOrdered.description: Whether an HIV test of the mother was ordered

motherHivTestDate.description: Date when a mother's HIV test was conducted

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE104

@id.description: Full IRI of the code from ValueSet HIV.E.DE104

maternalHivTestResult.description: Test result for mother after applying the testing strategy

infantOrChildExposureToHiv.description: Whether the infant or child was determined to have had HIV exposure through mother

hivExposedInfantOrChild.description: Whether the infant or child was determined to have had HIV exposure

keyPopulationMember.description: Mother is a member of a key population which has an increased risk of HIV

@type.description: JSON-LD type reference to ValueSet HIV.E.DE114

items.description: Coding from ValueSet HIV.E.DE114. Supports both FHIR Coding structure and JSON-LD structure.

keyPopulationMemberType.description: The type of key population that the infant's mother is included in

postpartumFamilyPlanningCounsellingCondu.description: Provide family planning and contraception counselling

ageOfInfantOnHivTestDate.description: Infant's age when an HIV test is performed in months and years (calculated from date of birth)

arvAdherenceCounselling.description: Counselling was carried out during visit

infantFeedingCounsellingProvided.description: Support on infant and child feeding to mother or caregiver provided

dateInfantFeedingCounsellingProvided.description: Date support on infant and child feeding to mother or caregiver provided

malariaPreventionCounsellingConducted.description: Counselling provided on how to prevent malaria

insecticideTreatedBednetItnProvidedOrRef.description: An insecticide treated bednet (ITN) was provided or the client was referred

maternalSyphilisTreatment.description: Whether or not mother was treated for syphilis

takingIronAndFolicAcidIfaTablets.description: Is client taking her iron and folic acid (IFA) tablets? Select whether the woman is continuing to take IFA supplements

dateInfantArvProphylaxisDispensedOrStart.description: Date HIV-exposed infant received ARV prophylaxis (for the first time)
